# eventDuration

**Instance Property**

The date and time range that indicates the beginning and end of the event.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var eventDuration: INDateComponentsRange { get }
```

## Getting Ticketed Event Information

- **category**: The type of ticketed event.
- **INTicketedEventCategory**: Constants that define the type of ticketed event.
- **location**: The name and location of the ticketed event.
- **name**: The name of the event.
